title: Worker Completion Report
description: Schema-validated completion report submitted by worker nodes after task execution

task_id.description: Task ID matching the dispatched task blueprint

node.description: Node number that executed the task

status.description: Final execution status of the task

file.description: Path to the file that was created or modified

changes_made.description: List of all files created or modified during task execution

query.description: The question asked of the Gemini cache or search

gemini_queries.description: Gemini cache and search queries executed during the task

file.description: File or area affected by the alert

description.description: What needs attention from other workstreams

cross_stream_alerts.description: Findings that affect other workstreams beyond this task's scope

new_issues.description: Problems discovered beyond the original task scope

blocked_on.description: What is missing or needed to proceed; required when status is BLOCKED
